summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quick View Modal feature. All requested features working correctly on both home page and menu page, desktop and mobile views.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps ADD button on mobile - requires force=True click (external badge, not app issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick View Modal feature fully tested and working. Test IDs: quick-view-overlay, quick-view-modal, quick-view-close, quick-view-add-btn, quick-view-qty. Modal opens on image click, shows dish details, ADD button works, quantity controls work, close button and overlay click both close modal.

Quick view modal opens when clicking dish image on /menu page
Quick view shows dish name correctly
Quick view shows dish description correctly
Quick view shows dish price correctly
Quick view shows veg badge for vegetarian items
Quick view shows non-veg badge for non-vegetarian items
Quick view shows bestseller badge for bestseller items
ADD button in quick view adds item to cart
Quantity controls (- qty +) appear after adding item
Quantity increase (+) button works correctly
Quantity decrease (-) button works correctly
Cart badge in navbar updates after adding from quick view
Close button (X) closes the modal
Clicking overlay (outside modal) closes the modal
Desktop view: Modal appears as centered card
Mobile view: Modal appears as bottom sheet with rounded top corners
Mobile view: Bottom sheet handle visible
Existing menu features still work: category tabs
Existing menu features still work: search functionality
Existing menu features still work: veg filter toggle
Existing menu features still work: regular Add button on card
